name: Bega Cheese Limited
analysis: BGA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 16% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$5.6100, stop A$5.3064, target A$6.1906 (1.91:1) — then trail it.
